title: Integration Testing Infrastructure
description: Test engineer spins up containerized databases, Schema Registry, and Kafka for integration tests using Testcontainers + Quarkus lifecycle managers.

actors.name: TestEngineer
actors.description: Runs Quarkus integration test suite; triggers container lifecycle via @QuarkusTestResource annotations

actors.name: QuarkusTestFramework
actors.description: Calls start()/stop() on all registered QuarkusTestResourceLifecycleManager implementations before/after test runs

actors.name: Docker/Testcontainers
actors.description: Underlying container runtime; provisions and destroys container instances

system_boundary: Integration Test Infrastructure (debezium-testing-testcontainers + binlog test utilities)

use_cases.name: Start PostgreSQL Container
use_cases.description: Starts a GenericContainer with quay.io/debezium/example-postgres, waits for 'database system is ready' log (2 occurrences, 30s timeout), exposes port 5432, returns debezium.source.database.* config params.

use_cases.name: Start Apicurio Schema Registry Container
use_cases.description: Starts ApicurioRegistryContainer (quay.io/apicurio/apicurio-registry-mem), waits for 'apicurio-registry-app.*started in' log. Returns Apicurio URL config params.

use_cases.name: Start Kafka + Schema Registry Containers
use_cases.description: Starts KafkaContainer (quay.io/debezium/confluentinc-cp-kafka:7.2.10) and SchemaRegistryContainer on a shared Docker network. Uses Startables.deepStart() to start both in parallel. SchemaRegistry depends on Kafka, 90s timeout. Returns Schema Registry URL.

use_cases.name: Stop Schema Registry Container
use_cases.description: Calls schemaRegistryContainer.stop() only (Kafka container not explicitly stopped here). Exceptions swallowed.

use_cases.name: Obtain Binlog Test Database Connection
use_cases.description: Uses ServiceLoader<TestConnectionProvider> to discover the first registered provider (MySQL or MariaDB via META-INF/services). Delegates to provider.forTestDatabase(databaseName). Default database name is 'mysql'.

use_cases.name: Resolve Apicurio Registry URL
use_cases.description: Static helper method returns the running Apicurio container's URL for use in test assertions or manual config.

key_relationships: SchemaRegistryContainer depends_on KafkaContainer (Testcontainers dependsOn + shared network)
include_exclude_notes: All three lifecycle managers are static singletons (static final container fields) — shared across test instances
PostgresTestResourceLifecycleManager exposes getContainer() static accessor for direct container access
ApicurioRegistryContainer version resolved at runtime from system property or ContainerImageVersions utility
TestConnectionService is stateless utility; actual connection logic is in BinlogTestConnection (not analysed here)
